TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Danilo Medina = Mntucing hngkawas 1951 idas 11 jiyax 10 ka Danilo Medina ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Dominican republic ta sayang o kiya ka Danilo Medina, pnaah hngkawas 2012 idas 4 jiyax 16 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Danilo Medina = Danilo Medina S√°nchez mniq kngkawas 1996-1999 mi kngkawas 2004-2006 mn2 ngalan Sotohu Kwowu Misu, Danilo Medina S√°nchez u Dominican Cyeyhwang Tang tangweyn. Bukuy daw wada mangal 51.24% hyo ini niya baka ka brah Soto Iborido Meysiya, wada mbiyax mangal kngkawas 2012 Dominican Soto Knbeyhing Seyngkyo, kiya mi kngkawas 2016 daw wada lmutuc Soto dungan ; kngkawas 2020 idas 8 diyax 16, malix Soto Dominican. Danilo Medina S√°nchez mntuting Dominican Tuiwil Hunac Snghun San Juan na Arroyo Cano, kiya ka Juan Pablo Medina mi Amelia S√°nchez 8 hiyi kana laqi dha qbsuran. Kngkawas 1973 Huan Pose phiyu Dominican Cyeyhwang Tang cida, Danilo Medina S√°nchez u dmuwi mpdudul laqi muyas tumal tang. Danilo Medina S√°nchez mniq Pyasan Tusweyweyn Santo Domingo Rikong (INTEC) muyas cingcisi, kngkawas 1984 cida wada knmalu bay ka pnyasan niya mnhdu muyas. Kngkawas 1983 Danilo Medina S√°nchez u wada mangal Cyeyfang Tang Congyang Yingkay Weyweyn, kngkawas 1986 wada mangal Kwohuy giying, kngkawas 1987 Danilo Medina S√°nchez tuhuy Sinri Sweycya Kantida Mongtiya msturung, niqan 3 laqi qridin. Kngkawas 1990 cida, Danilo Medina S√°nchez u wada mangal Cyeyfang Tang Seyji Yingkay Weyweyn. Kngkawas 1994 dhuq kngkawas 1995, wada ngalan Dominican Conggiying Cusi. Babawi niya daw ngalan Sotohu Kwowu Misu. Kngkawas 2000 cida, Danilo Medina S√°nchez u wada ngalan Cyeyfang Tang Soto hosweynjn, mniq tumn2 seyngkyo cida u wada 24.9% hyo ka hiya mi wada ini baka 49.87% hyo ka Keming Tang Ibolito Meysia. Kngkawas 2012 idas 5 diyax 21 cida, Danilo Medina S√°nchez u mntxal muda phyuwan Cyeyfang Tang Soto hosweynjn, hiti balay daw wada mbiyax mangal 51.24% hyo mi ngalan Soto nduray. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = danilo m…ôdina = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas ** …üijax ** ka danilo m…ôdina ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan domini ¶an …ĺ…ôpubli ¶ ta sajaŇč o kija ka danilo m…ôdina, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. = danilo m…ôdina = danilo m…ôdina s*n ¶ńß…ô* mniq kŇčkawas ****-**** mi kŇčkawas ****-**** mn* Ňčalan sotońßu kwowu misu, danilo m…ôdina s*n ¶ńß…ô* u domini ¶an ¶j…ôńßwaŇč taŇč taŇčw…ôn. bukuj daw wada maŇčal **.**% ńßjo ini nija baka ka b…ĺańß soto ibo…ĺido m…ôsija, wada mbijax maŇčal kŇčkawas **** domini ¶an soto knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo, kija mi kŇčkawas **** daw wada lmutu ¶ soto duŇčan ; kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, malix soto domini ¶an. danilo m…ôdina s*n ¶ńß…ô* mntutiŇč domini ¶an tuiwil ńßuna ¶ sŇčńßun san …üuan na a…ĺ…ĺojo ¶ano, kija ka …üuan pablo m…ôdina mi am…ôlia s*n ¶ńß…ô* * ńßiji kana laqi dńßa qbsu…ĺan. kŇčkawas **** ńßuan pos…ô pńßiju domini ¶an ¶j…ôńßwaŇč taŇč ¶ida, danilo m…ôdina s*n ¶ńß…ô* u dmuwi mpdudul laqi mujas tumal taŇč. danilo m…ôdina s*n ¶ńß…ô* mniq pjasan tusw…ôw…ôn santo domiŇčo …ĺikoŇč (int…ô ¶) mujas ¶iŇč ¶isi, kŇčkawas **** ¶ida wada knmalu baj ka pnjasan nija mnńßdu mujas. kŇčkawas **** danilo m…ôdina s*n ¶ńß…ô* u wada maŇčal ¶j…ô*aŇč taŇč ¶oŇčjaŇč jiŇčkaj w…ôw…ôn, kŇčkawas **** wada maŇčal kwońßuj gijiŇč, kŇčkawas **** danilo m…ôdina s*n ¶ńß…ô* tuńßuj sin…ĺi sw…ô ¶ja kantida moŇčtija mstu…ĺuŇč, niqan * laqi q…ĺidin. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, danilo m…ôdina s*n ¶ńß…ô* u wada maŇčal ¶j…ô*aŇč taŇč s…ô…üi jiŇčkaj w…ôw…ôn. kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas ****, wada Ňčalan domini ¶an ¶oŇčgijiŇč ¶usi. babawi nija daw Ňčalan sotońßu kwowu misu. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, danilo m…ôdina s*n ¶ńß…ô* u wada Ňčalan ¶j…ô*aŇč taŇč soto ńßosw…ôn…ün, mniq tumn* s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida u wada **.*% ńßjo ka ńßija mi wada ini baka **.**% ńßjo ka k…ômiŇč taŇč ibolito m…ôsia. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** ¶ida, danilo m…ôdina s*n ¶ńß…ô* u mntxal muda pńßjuwan ¶j…ô*aŇč taŇč soto ńßosw…ôn…ün, ńßiti balaj daw wada mbijax maŇčal **.**% ńßjo mi Ňčalan soto ndu…ĺaj. pnjańßan pnatas
S.FORM: = Danilo Medina = Mntucing hngkawas 1951 idas 11 jiyax 10 ka Danilo Medina ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Dominican republic ta sayang o kiya ka Danilo Medina, pnaah hngkawas 2012 idas 4 jiyax 16 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Danilo Medina = Danilo Medina S√°nchez mniq kngkawas 1996-1999 mi kngkawas 2004-2006 mn2 ngalan Sotohu Kwowu Misu, Danilo Medina S√°nchez u Dominican Cyeyhwang Tang tangweyn. Bukuy daw wada mangal 51.24% hyo ini niya baka ka brah Soto Iborido Meysiya, wada mbiyax mangal kngkawas 2012 Dominican Soto Knbeyhing Seyngkyo, kiya mi kngkawas 2016 daw wada lmutuc Soto dungan ; kngkawas 2020 idas 8 diyax 16, malix Soto Dominican. Danilo Medina S√°nchez mntuting Dominican Tuiwil Hunac Snghun San Juan na Arroyo Cano, kiya ka Juan Pablo Medina mi Amelia S√°nchez 8 hiyi kana laqi dha qbsuran. Kngkawas 1973 Huan Pose phiyu Dominican Cyeyhwang Tang cida, Danilo Medina S√°nchez u dmuwi mpdudul laqi muyas tumal tang. Danilo Medina S√°nchez mniq Pyasan Tusweyweyn Santo Domingo Rikong (INTEC) muyas cingcisi, kngkawas 1984 cida wada knmalu bay ka pnyasan niya mnhdu muyas. Kngkawas 1983 Danilo Medina S√°nchez u wada mangal Cyeyfang Tang Congyang Yingkay Weyweyn, kngkawas 1986 wada mangal Kwohuy giying, kngkawas 1987 Danilo Medina S√°nchez tuhuy Sinri Sweycya Kantida Mongtiya msturung, niqan 3 laqi qridin. Kngkawas 1990 cida, Danilo Medina S√°nchez u wada mangal Cyeyfang Tang Seyji Yingkay Weyweyn. Kngkawas 1994 dhuq kngkawas 1995, wada ngalan Dominican Conggiying Cusi. Babawi niya daw ngalan Sotohu Kwowu Misu. Kngkawas 2000 cida, Danilo Medina S√°nchez u wada ngalan Cyeyfang Tang Soto hosweynjn, mniq tumn2 seyngkyo cida u wada 24.9% hyo ka hiya mi wada ini baka 49.87% hyo ka Keming Tang Ibolito Meysia. Kngkawas 2012 idas 5 diyax 21 cida, Danilo Medina S√°nchez u mntxal muda phyuwan Cyeyfang Tang Soto hosweynjn, hiti balay daw wada mbiyax mangal 51.24% hyo mi ngalan Soto nduray. Pnyahan pnatas

kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, malix soto domini ¶an. danilo m…ôdina s*n ¶ńß…ô* mntutiŇč domini ¶an tuiwil ńßuna ¶ sŇčńßun san …üuan na a…ĺ…ĺojo ¶ano, kija ka …üuan pablo m…ôdina mi am…ôlia s*n ¶ńß…ô* * ńßiji kana laqi dńßa qbsu…ĺan. kŇčkawas **** ńßuan pos…ô pńßiju domini ¶an ¶j…ôńßwaŇč taŇč ¶ida, danilo m…ôdina s*n ¶ńß…ô* u dmuwi mpdudul laqi mujas tumal taŇč. danilo m…ôdina s*n ¶ńß…ô* mniq pjasan tusw…ôw…ôn santo domiŇčo …ĺikoŇč (int…ô ¶) mujas ¶iŇč ¶isi, kŇčkawas **** ¶ida wada knmalu baj ka pnjasan nija mnńßdu mujas. kŇčkawas **** danilo m…ôdina s*n ¶ńß…ô* u wada maŇčal ¶j…ô*aŇč taŇč ¶oŇčjaŇč jiŇčkaj w…ôw…ôn, kŇčkawas **** wada maŇčal kwońßuj gijiŇč, kŇčkawas **** danilo m…ôdina s*n ¶ńß…ô* tuńßuj sin…ĺi sw…ô ¶ja kantida moŇčtija mstu…ĺuŇč, niqan * laqi q…ĺidin. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, danilo m…ôdina s*n ¶ńß…ô* u wada maŇčal ¶j…ô*aŇč taŇč s…ô…üi jiŇčkaj w…ôw…ôn. kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas ****, wada Ňčalan domini ¶an ¶oŇčgijiŇč ¶usi. babawi nija daw Ňčalan sotońßu kwowu misu. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, danilo m…ôdina s*n ¶ńß…ô* u wada Ňčalan ¶j…ô*aŇč taŇč soto ńßosw…ôn…ün, mniq tumn* s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida u wada **.*% ńßjo ka ńßija mi wada ini baka **.**% ńßjo ka k…ômiŇč taŇč ibolito m…ôsia. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** ¶ida, danilo m…ôdina s*n ¶ńß…ô* u mntxal muda pńßjuwan ¶j…ô*aŇč taŇč soto ńßosw…ôn…ün, ńßiti balaj daw wada mbijax maŇčal **.**% ńßjo mi Ňčalan soto ndu…ĺaj. pnjańßan pnatas
